summary: Matched several Big Blue stage functions in src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c and tightened related header prototypes. The PR added the Big Blue StageCallbacks table, implemented grBigBlue_801E59F8 as the stage-ground object setup helper, and matched grBigBlue_801E5AE4, grBigBlue_801E6200, and grBigBlue_801E6298. decomp.dev reported +368 matched bytes, with 3 new 100% matches and grBigBlue_801E59F8 improved to 99.97%.

key_files.role: Implemented Big Blue stage callback table and several previously stubbed/unknown grBigBlue functions.
Updated prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed HSD_GObj and callback signatures; added baselib forward declaration include.

what_changed: Added includes needed by the matched code: grmaterial.h, grdisplay.h, baselib/jobj.h, baselib/gobjproc.h, baselib/gobjgxlink.h, and gr/types.h.

Added grBb_803E29E0 StageCallbacks array for Big Blue, wiring callback groups such as grBigBlue_801E5AE4/801E5B10/801E5B18/801E5B1C, grBigBlue_801E6298/801E6354/801E635C/801E6360, and later map-object callback groups; several entries remain NULL-filled.

Implemented grBigBlue_801E59F8(s32 id) to create/fetch a ground GObj via Ground_801C14D0, initialize Ground callbacks, set up GX link through GObj_SetupGXLink with grDisplay_801C5DB0, install callback3 as x1C_callback, call callback0, register callback2 as an HSD_GObjProc, and OSReport if the GObj is missing.
Implemented grBigBlue_801E5AE4 to start ground animation with grAnime_801C8138 using the ground object's map_id.
Implemented grBigBlue_801E6200 to animate the ground object, clear x10_flags.b2, apply material flags through grMaterial_801C8A04 and grMaterial_801C8858, and set x11_flags.b012 to 1.
Implemented grBigBlue_801E6298 to animate the ground object, collect multiple child JObjs via Ground_801C3FA4, pass them to Ground_801C4E70, and set x11_flags.b012 to 2.
Changed grBigBlue_801E59F8 header prototype from unknown return/params to HSD_GObj *grBigBlue_801E59F8(s32).
Changed fn_801EFB9C header prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void fn_801EFB9C(HSD_GObj*, int).
smart_moves: Reconstructed the StageCallbacks table in the C file instead of leaving callback dispatch implicit, making later Big Blue object matching easier and searchable by callback slot.
Used existing stage/ground helper APIs rather than open-coding behavior: Ground_801C14D0, GET_GROUND, GObj_SetupGXLink, HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54, grAnime_801C8138, Ground_801C3FA4, and Ground_801C4E70.
Preserved the game’s error-reporting behavior in grBigBlue_801E59F8, including the OSReport format string and file/line evidence from the diff.
Advanced header accuracy alongside function matching, replacing placeholder prototypes where the implementation exposed concrete argument and return types.
Kept matched functions small and stage-specific, focusing on clear initialization and callback wiring patterns common to other gr* stage files.
decomp_lessons: Stage object setup functions often follow a reusable pattern: get/create a Ground GObj by id, zero x8_callback and xC_callback, configure GX link, copy StageCallbacks entries into Ground fields or proc registration, then invoke init callbacks if present.
When a stage callback table is recovered, it can unlock several functions at once because object init, update, render, and proc callbacks share a consistent StageCallbacks layout.
Ground animation init commonly uses grAnime_801C8138(gobj, GET_GROUND(gobj)->map_id, 0). This pattern matched grBigBlue_801E5AE4 and appears inside other object init functions.
Material/JObj operations may be required for exact stage-object init matches; in this PR grMaterial_801C8A04 and grMaterial_801C8858 were needed in grBigBlue_801E6200.
Child JObj ordering matters for matching. grBigBlue_801E6298 stores Ground_801C3FA4 results in temporaries and passes them to Ground_801C4E70 in a specific order.
Header forward declarations should be updated when replacing UNK prototypes with HSD_GObj or other concrete baselib types.
naming_conventions: Big Blue stage symbols use the grBigBlue_80xxxxxx address-based naming convention when semantic names are not yet known.
The stage callback table is named grBb_803E29E0, using the shorter grBb prefix for Big Blue data.
Ground object arguments are typed as Ground_GObj* in callbacks where the implementation operates on stage ground objects.
The diff keeps address comments in grbigblue.h, e.g. /* 1E59F8 */ HSD_GObj *grBigBlue_801E59F8(s32);.
Unknown placeholders are replaced with concrete prototypes when evidence is available, rather than retaining UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Introduced explicit local temporaries such as temp_r31 through temp_r27 in grBigBlue_801E6298, likely to preserve register allocation and call-argument ordering.
Added an unused-looking void* filler local in grBigBlue_801E6200; evidence suggests it was part of the matching attempt, but the diff alone does not explain why.

Used unsigned literal suffixes in calls such as GObj_SetupGXLink(..., 3U, 0U), HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54(..., 4U), grMaterial_801C8A04(..., 0x08000000U), and grMaterial_801C8858(..., 0x20000000U), which can affect exact codegen.
Retained exact callback-null checks before assigning or invoking StageCallbacks members in grBigBlue_801E59F8.
decomp.dev reported grBigBlue_801E59F8 reached 99.97% rather than 100%, so this implementation was a near-match but not fully matching according to the bot report.

review_feedback.feedback: New 100% matches: grBigBlue_801E6298 (+188 bytes), grBigBlue_801E6200 (+136 bytes), and grBigBlue_801E5AE4 (+44 bytes).
grBigBlue_801E59F8 improved from 0.00% to 99.97% (+235 bytes), but was not reported as a full match.
No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that bring grBigBlue_801E59F8 from 99.97% to 100%.
Search other stage files for StageCallbacks table reconstruction patterns similar to grBb_803E29E0.
Investigate whether tmpPadData[168] is later renamed, typed, or moved to a shared Big Blue data header.
Check subsequent grBigBlue PRs for semantic names replacing address-based functions in the callback table.
Compare grBigBlue_801E6200 material flag setup against similar stage object init functions using grMaterial_801C8A04 and grMaterial_801C8858.
